scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that the label's vertical offset is proportional to font size (self.title_size * 0.01 inch) instead of a fixed constant.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The solution must compute the vertical offset as a function of font size, not a fixed constant.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Using hardcoded offset (e.g., 0.1 inch) will fail the hidden SVG parsing check because the y-position will be off.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')
result = None
covered_requirements: Require the label's vertical offset to be proportional to the font size (self.title_size) instead of a fixed constant.
